recommendations.overview: Stig-Helmer and Ole Bramserud on a trip to the Canary Islands for Christmas.

recommendations.title: Page Eight
recommendations.overview: Johnny is a long-serving MI5 officer. His boss dies suddenly, leaving behind an inexplicable file which threatens the stability of the organisation.

recommendations.title: Haven
recommendations.overview: During a weekend, two shady businessmen flee to the Cayman Islands to avoid federal prosecution. But their escape ignites a chain reaction that leads a British native to commit a crime that changes the nation.
